productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Denim Co. Men Blue Slim Straight Fit Jeans
description: A pair of blue 5-pocket mid-rise jeans, lightly washed, whiskers on the crotch, has a zip fly with a button closure, a waistband with belt loops, a scoop pocket on either side on the front with rivets, a coin pocket on the right with an embroidered branding, a panelled patch pocket on either side on the back, a brand patch on the back waistband, contrast stitched detail throughout
